title: The Underground Library and the Big Bubble Bonanza
summary: Mole, Mickey Mouse, and Minnie Mouse go on an adventure to find a new book, leading them to a magical Underground Library hidden beneath an old tree stump. There, they meet Mischief Mouse, the librarian, who helps them check out 'The Big Bubble Bonanza'. Within the book's pages, they learn about Wibble the giraffe, who overcomes the challenges of his great height to buy bubble soap and craft a star-shaped bubble wand from clay, branches, and playdough. The story concludes with Wibble successfully blowing colorful bubbles that sparkle in the sunlight above the forest.

highlightQuote.text: Okay, just pick out your books first and then scan them at the check out counter.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: See? We're going right to stars and stories.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: I'm in the chair, but where do you want this thing?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: I'll be right next to you. All right, let me get the light on. Whee! Okay. Well, that's better. Oh, that's better. Hmm. Here, if I just prop this up a little bit like that. Let me try something else. Well, got a little bit of stars. Right...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Let's tell a story about Mole, Mickey, Minnie.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, Mole and Mickey and Minnie were walking through the forest one day. And Minnie said, Minnie Mouse said to everyone, 'Gosh, I'd love to find a new interesting book to read.' And Mickey says, 'Oh yeah, I haven't read anything good lately. I wonder what there is to read around here.' And Mole said, 'Well, everyone, you're in luck because we happen to be walking along this path that leads right to a very special place. Do you know what that place is called? It's the underground library.' Hmm. Let's try to find it. I think it's over here in between the roots of this old tree stump. Let me see. Oh, yeah! Here it is. And they found a very old-looking wooden door with a sign on it and it said 'The Underground Library.' And you know what else there was?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Hmm?

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: A little doorbell button. And the mole said, 'Well, we'd better be polite and ring the doorbell. I don't know if the librarian's in today. Have you ever met the librarian, Mickey and Minnie?' And they said, 'No, who's the librarian?' Um...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Okay, just pick out your books first and then scan them at the check out counter.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And the mole said, 'Yeah, we can pick out some books because the librarian is a good friend of mine. Uh, the librarian happens to be a worm, a bookworm.'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, not him. She's Mischief Mousey. Squeak, squeak, squeak.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh yeah, and the other librarian is Mischief Mouse. Well, let's ring the doorbell and see if she's here. Bing-bong! And suddenly...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, it's ding-dong.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, ding-dong! The door popped open and Mischief Mouse said, 'Oh, hello everyone. I just started my shift at the library. Come on in.' And Mischief Mouse led the way into the tunnel that went deep underground. But it was brightly lit by little lamps all along the walls and ceiling. And then, when they went down the tunnel, they got to a big wide-open room, and it was round, and all around the sides were shelves full of books, stacked from floor to ceiling. All kinds of different books. Big books and little books, fat books and skinny books. Books about the real world and about science and things you can learn, and books about imaginary places and things and people. Um, and Mischief Mouse said, 'Well, what kind of book are you interested in?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Mmm, luscious... blow... I'm going to send Tia a picture. Cheese Tia! Cheese Tia! We sent Tia a picture.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, that was nice of you to send Tia a picture. Do you think she'll like it? Hmm, okay. Tia loves to know what we're all up to. And so Mickey and Minnie, what did they say about what kind of book they were interested in? They thought for a minute, they thought, 'Hmm, do you think we should get a book about sea creatures or one about bubbles? Or maybe one about trees?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Or bubbles. Or bubbles.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And the mole said, 'Maybe one about bubbles.' And Mickey said, 'Yeah, that does sound good.' And Mischief Mouse said, 'Well, you're in luck because someone just returned one of my favorite books of all time, and it's called The Big Bubble Bonanza. It's a really big book and it's all about bubbles. Let me go find it on the shelf. Okay, we'll use the alphabet to find this book. It's under B. Now let's see. The alphabet starts with A and then next comes... what comes after that?'

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: B.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: B! Oh, it must be right here. Let's see. B, B, B, Big. Big Bubble Bonanza! There it is. And the mole... or no, Mischief Mouse pulled it right off the shelf and said, 'Okay, would you like to check it out?' And what did Mickey say?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No. And then Mischief Minnie said 'Noke'.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Noke? Why'd she say that?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: No, she said, 'Yes'.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Okay, let's check out the book. Um, okay. So they checked out the book and then they walked um out the tunnel back all the way up to the forest floor. And they went outside and they had their new book checked out from the library: Big Bubble Bonanza. And did they take it somewhere to read it? Where'd they go?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: In the living room.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: They went to the living room and they sat in comfy chairs and they read The Big Bubble Bonanza. And now we'll tell the story of The Big Bubble Bonanza. In the book, it starts with a character named...

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Who? I don't know.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, the character's named Wibble. And do you know what Wibble is?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah, a bubble. No, not Wibble is a bubble. No, no. He's a... mmm... giraffe.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Oh, Wibble is a giraffe. One day, Wibble the giraffe really wanted to blow some bubbles, but he didn't have any soap. And so, he decided to go to the store and buy some. So he went to the store. It was hard for a giraffe to go to the store because he's so tall, he had to lean his neck way down to go inside. But he bought some bubble soap and then he went back out and he put it in a bowl and he swished it around with some water and splosh, splosh, splosh, splosh, splosh. He made some bubbles. But he really wanted a bubble to fly through the air. So he was going to need a bubble wand. But he realized he could make one. How'd he make his bubble wand?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: He made a star bubble wand. Points on the top.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: With points, yeah. What'd he make it out of?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Clay and tree branches.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yes, because this... what?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: And playdough.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And playdough. He made his own bubble wand out of clay and tree branches and playdough. And it was star-shaped. And when it was all done, he dipped it in his bubble soap and he lifted it up to his lips and he blew a little air. And what happened?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Yeah!

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And then some bubbles came out and they went pop, pop, pop. And the bubbles flew out into the air and lifted up on the breeze and they sparkled in the sunlight, all different colors. And they flew up over the forest and then they popped. Pop! And the giraffe was so happy. And that's the end of The Big Bubble Bonanza. And that's the end of Stars and Stories.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Now we should... it's time to go on a read a book.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Read a book? Okay. Good idea.

characters.name: Mole
characters.description: A resourceful, perpetually humming mole with an impossibly long name, this polite and intrepid mariner serves as a bridge between worlds, translating Frasgle’s unique tongue and guiding the way to the hidden Underground Library. Whether managing rocket controls with wide-eyed curiosity, unraveling treehouse mysteries, or sharing the magic of special Legos, he encourages his companions to embrace the unknown between tending his dandelion yard and baking fragrant banana bread. A lover of both wriggly worms and sweet blueberries, he sings whimsical songs of carnabee sharks and drives a noisy dark brown car, remaining firmly hesitant about boarding giant robots even as he coaxes his friends toward bold new adventures.

characters.name: Mickey
characters.description: One of Mistress Mouse’s storied stuffy mice, this famous plush adventurer is a visionary benefactor who manifests fragrant blooms from magic Legos and pilots his Mousecar through lightless depths. Whether arming moles for Kitty’s investigations or securing solutions for Frasgle, he remains fiercely loyal to Minnie, Mole, Izzy, and Hattie. Accompanied by a cheerful infant and shadowed by a friend’s disappearance, his haste to reach the spires of Peacock’s castle has left him without essential provisions, miring him in a sudden, hungry peril.

characters.name: Minnie
characters.description: A wise veteran of briny depths and interstellar frontiers, Mickey’s resourceful mouse companion and confidant to the Princess of Mouseland guides Izzy and Hattie with a glowing lantern and ingenious Mystery Mousketools. Having recently breathed life into a towering guardian of interlocking bricks, this intrepid traveler now points the way toward the mountain’s peak, pausing to investigate the savory aroma of bacon-scented mushrooms while serving as a compassionate friend whose seasoned instincts help decipher Frasgle’s complex roars and sounds.

characters.name: Mischief Mouse
characters.description: Reigning from a purple-striped Jovian castle, this affable mouse King—a playful-named companion to Pinecone Mouse—is a seasoned adventurer, guardian of the Underground Library, and Hattie’s steadfast ally. Between savoring artisanal cheeses and awaiting a rugged cardboard replacement for his fragile Lego hat, he spends leisure hours meticulously constructing and gleefully smashing soaring towers. A pancake-loving monarch who once tended shop for mountain-dwelling traffic cones, his cosmic quests recently shifted from the stars to the speedway; having borrowed a tow truck from Mistress Mouse, he proved a formidable competitor who nearly clinched a stunning victory. Whether piloting starships or joining the group’s latest trek to Nana’s house, he remains a vigilant protector and devoted friend across the galaxy.

characters.name: Wibble
characters.description: A very tall giraffe who enjoys blowing bubbles and is remarkably creative.

places.name: The Forest
places.description: Cloaking the surface of the green planet in a vast mantle of dense greenery, this whispering woodland serves as the lush setting of the 'Forest Friends' chronicle. It is a realm where creatures play eternal hide-and-seek between Hattie’s cozy clinic and the ancestral cradle of Finn’s companions. Along magical trails where Hattie and the Pakruder Worm harvest hat-making ingredients, winding paths veil secret gopher tunnels and hidden mole cottages, forming the essential route toward the wizard's castle. While its sun-drenched threshold remains a sanctuary for the Rainbow Giraffe and Mama Bird, the deeper, darker thickets harbor a somber mystery; it was within these sprawling, uncharted depths—the same eerie expanse where the sick creature was first spotted and Mossy was discovered—that Mole recently vanished into the shadows.

places.name: Underground Library
places.description: A hidden library located between the roots of an old tree stump, filled with books.

places.name: Tunnel
places.description: A brightly lit passage leading deep underground to the library.

places.name: Living Room
places.description: Tucked within the mole hole’s earthy embrace, this cozy sanctuary is anchored by overstuffed chairs and the lingering warmth of shared laughter. It is a cherished retreat where family and friends gather to pore over the pages of a new book, settling together into the quiet, subterranean comfort of their home.

places.name: Store
places.description: A place where Wibble the giraffe goes to purchase bubble soap, despite his height.
